task: Using only the provided embedded packet, rebuild the decision logic for a protein-language-model-based mutant prioritization filter, identify any threshold crossings, perform sensitivity testing (including 5% shifts) of classifications, and produce review-ready deliverables: (1) mutant_priority_table.csv containing row-level calculations, formulas/executable logic, intermediate values, row-level citations to the embedded packet, classification, margin, remediation recommendation(s) and cost accounting; and (2) experiment_brief.md containing methods, traceable calculations, assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity analysis, acceptance criteria, unresolved ambiguities (marked needs_review), and a final decision table. Do not use external data or invent inputs. Mark expert-review required where the rules demand it.
